hero.subtitle: Leave spreadsheets behind. Calculate real costs, manage filament stock, and track orders in one place with an elite interface.

modules.title: Everything your business needs

health.title: Business Health Score
health.desc: Your smart assistant. Analyzes costs, deadlines, and stock to provide a real-time 'health' score for your business.

calc.title: Cost Calculator
calc.desc: Industrial formulas that consider machine amortization, electricity, failures, and margin. Exact prices in seconds.

materials.title: Materials Management
materials.desc: Total control of your filament inventory. Know exactly how much you have and receive low stock alerts.

finance.title: Financial Reports

printers.title: Printer Management

branding.title: Branding & Customization

pricing.footer_note: All plans include SSL, automatic backup, and email support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card for the trial?
faq.a1: No. The 14-day trial is free, and after that period, it automatically closes if you don't choose a plan.
faq.a2: Yes, we use Row Level Security (RLS) to ensure that no one else accesses what belongs to you.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Definitely. No contract, cancel whenever you wish in the subscription panel.

cta.pill: 🎯 No excuses for charging less than you deserve
cta.title: Your next order can have the right price.
cta.subtitle: Join makers and creators who use 3DZAAP to price with confidence.
